description.en: Whispers an old curse that weakens the target's strikes for a while.
description.cs: Zašeptá starou kletbu, která na chvíli oslabí údery cíle.

to_target.self: you whisper an old, dry word and {target} feels their strength begin to fade.
to_target.others: {actor} whispers an old, dry word and {target} sags as something inside them fades.

to_target.self: zašeptáš staré, suché slovo a {target} cítí, jak mu síla začíná ubývat.
to_target.others: {actor} zašeptá staré, suché slovo a {target} se prohne, jak v něm něco vyhasne.
